hero.subline: ROA runs your Amazon ads, optimizes every listing, and publishes content for AI search — so your team can focus on product, not platforms.

audience.subtitle: Entering a new market, hitting a ceiling, or taking back control — ROA becomes the commerce team you need.

cards.title: Manufacturers going direct
cards.description: You have a great product but no Amazon expertise or commerce team. ROA becomes your team from day one — ads, listings, content, and growth strategy included.

cards.title: Brands hitting a ceiling
cards.description: Your agency runs ads, but nobody owns growth. Channels are siloed, data is scattered, and scaling means more vendors and more cost.

cards.title: Brands taking back control
cards.description: Your agency holds the keys to your ad accounts, your data, your strategy. ROA gives sovereignty back — you see everything, you own everything.

audience.stat: The best commerce brands don't have the biggest teams. They have the best systems.
audience.transition: What if one system could operate every channel, react in real time, and get smarter with every sale?

problem.title: More channels, same team.
problem.opening: Amazon, Shopify, generative search, social — every channel has its own algorithm, its own playbook, its own pace. The brands that win operate everywhere, simultaneously, without missing a beat.

cards.title: Too many channels
cards.description: Each platform demands a different specialist, a different tool, a different strategy. Nobody connects it all — and gaps become missed revenue.

cards.title: Too slow to react
cards.description: Your weekly report is already outdated by the time you read it. Markets move in real time. Your operations should too.

cards.title: Too expensive to scale
cards.description: Every new channel, market, or brand means more headcount and more cost. Growth shouldn't require a linear increase in people.

problem.stat: The best commerce brands don't have the biggest teams. They have the best systems.
problem.transition: What if one system could operate every channel, react in real time, and get smarter with every sale?

solutions.subtitle: Specialized AI engines for advertising, content, and search — with a unified command center to see it all.

amazon.title: Amazon Ads Engine
amazon.description: Runs your entire Amazon business around the clock — real-time bidding, market analysis, listing optimization, search term management, and customer data.

capabilities.title: Real-Time Bidding
capabilities.description: SP, SB, SD campaigns optimized at the placement level, continuously. Not weekly reviews — live adjustments.

capabilities.title: Market Analysis
capabilities.description: Competitive positioning, category trends, and pricing intelligence updated daily for smarter decisions.

capabilities.title: Campaign Architecture
capabilities.description: Auto-builds and restructures campaign hierarchies — branded, category, competitor, discovery — so budget flows to the right intent.

capabilities.title: Search Term Optimization
capabilities.description: Finds high-converting search terms, expands what's working, cuts what's not — based on actual sales.

capabilities.title: Customer Data
capabilities.description: Repeat purchase cycles, brand loyalty signals, and customer lifetime value tracked and acted on.

contents.title: Contents Engine
contents.description: Analyzes every listing image, studies top-seller patterns, and extracts the copy insights that actually convert — so your content is built on data, not guesswork.

capabilities.title: Image Quality Analysis
capabilities.description: Every product image scored against category benchmarks — composition, text overlay, lifestyle context, and mobile readability.

capabilities.title: Top-Winner Patterns
capabilities.description: Reverse-engineers what the best-selling listings in your category do differently — layout, messaging, feature emphasis.

capabilities.title: Copy Insights
capabilities.description: Extracts golden phrases, benefit framing, and keyword placement from high-converting listings. Turns patterns into playbooks.

geo.title: GEO Engine
geo.description: Geo-targeted blog publishing, SEO monitoring, and keyword ranking — designed for generative search engines and human readers alike.

capabilities.title: Automated Blog Publishing
capabilities.description: Targeted articles researched, written, and published daily — with product links and attribution baked in.

capabilities.title: SEO Monitoring
capabilities.description: Track site health, indexing, and technical SEO metrics in real time. Issues flagged and fixed automatically.

capabilities.title: Keyword Rankings
capabilities.description: Position tracking across hundreds of keywords. Trends visualized, opportunities surfaced, strategy adapted.

capabilities.title: Niche Authority
capabilities.description: Systematic content strategy that makes your brand the go-to resource in your category for generative search.

dashboard.title: Command Center
dashboard.description: Unified cross-channel ROAS across Amazon, Shopify, and Meta — with live activity feeds, monthly summaries, and real-time performance monitoring.

capabilities.title: Unified ROAS
capabilities.description: See blended and per-channel return on ad spend in one view. No more spreadsheet reconciliation.

capabilities.title: Live Activity Feed
capabilities.description: Every bid change, content publish, and campaign update — logged and visible as it happens.

capabilities.title: Monthly Summaries
capabilities.description: Revenue, ad spend, ROAS, and orders — automatically compiled and ready for stakeholders.

solutions.callout: Not a dashboard. Not a chatbot. A system that thinks, acts, and learns.

metrics.title: The results speak for themselves.
metrics.subtitle: Aggregate performance across every brand and campaign running on ROA.
metrics.caseStudy: Including a manufacturer we took from $0 to $1M in its first 12 months on Amazon.

howItWorks.subtitle: From first connection to full operation in four steps.

steps.title: Connect
steps.description: Link your Seller Central, Shopify, and ad accounts. ROA pulls in your full history across every channel.

steps.title: Understand
steps.description: AI maps your market position, competitor landscape, content gaps, and campaign performance.

steps.title: Execute
steps.description: Bidding, content publishing, listing optimization, and campaign management — running 24/7 from day one.

steps.title: Compound
steps.description: Every decision is measured and fed back. The system sharpens with each cycle. Growth compounds over time.

landscape.titlePre: Not a better agency. A better
landscape.subtitle: ROA isn't an upgrade to what exists — it's a fundamentally different approach to commerce operations.
landscape.callout: Agencies sell hours. SaaS sells dashboards. Black-box AI sells magic. ROA delivers growth you can see, measure, and explain.

team.title: We built what we couldn't find.
team.story: We scaled Second Shower from zero to ₩10억 on Amazon in a single year — running every ad, every listing, every campaign ourselves. Then we turned that hard-won playbook into a platform.

founders.name: Jay Park
founders.description: Former Amazon Aggregator PM who grew Rael (K-beauty) from $5M to $30M. Deep hands-on expertise across advertising, supply chain, and brand strategy.

founders.name: Leo Park
founders.description: Product lead and design engineer. Previously at a health-tech startup and SK Chemicals. University of Sydney.

founders.name: Kai Kim
founders.description: M.S. in ML/AI from Georgia Tech. Published at ICML and CVPR. 5+ years building production AI systems at scale.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
ROA ("we", "us", or "our") operates the roa.global website. This page informs you of our policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of personal information.

**Information We Collect**
We collect information you provide directly, such as your name and email address when you use our contact form.

**How We Use Information**
We use the information to respond to your inquiries and communicate with you about our services.

**Third-Party Services**
Our contact form is powered by Web3Forms. Please refer to their privacy policy for information on how they handle data.

**Contact**
If you have questions about this policy, please contact us at hello@roa.global.

footer.description: AI commerce platform for Amazon, DTC, and generative search.

cookieConsent.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze site traffic.
